issues: timetable_slots has only 6 rows total — this is demo data, not a real timetable. Free/busy for every other teacher is vacuously 'free', so the dry run exercises the pipeline, not real scheduling pressure.
2 active teacher(s) have no teacher_contracts row (Demo Teacher, Sandra Swart) — no weekly cap known; daily cap left unset for them.

teachers.primary_dept is NULL for 71/71 active teachers — same-department matching finds NOBODY. (Departments are derivable from subjects.department via the load matrix; see Part C of schema/011_substitutions.sql.)
5 active teacher(s) have no load-matrix rows, so no known subjects: Demo Teacher, JO AN, MAIMONA, NEW PE FEMALE, RITA MAHFOUZ — they can never same-subject match.
substitutions table is empty — cover_done_recently is 0 for everyone (expected: no cover history exists yet).
rooms table is empty — room continuity can't be considered (harmless for cover, matters for the timetable builder).
